problem.title: Binary Tree Construction (Level Order)
problem.description:
Problem Statement:
Construct a Binary Tree from the given level-order traversal.

Input Format:
- First line contains integer N
- Second line contains N space-separated integers (-1 represents NULL)

Output Format:
- Print inorder traversal of the constructed tree

Example:
Input:
7
1 2 3 4 5 -1 6

Output:
4 2 5 1 3 6

solution.explanation: Build the tree by reading the level‑order array, using a queue to attach left and right children, then print an inorder traversal.
